summary: This source is a talk by a speaker (likely David Katz) who is not Frank B. Hu, though they mention collaborating with him. Because the prompt requires extracting only Frank B. Hu's own thoughts or reported views, this extraction is intentionally near-empty, capturing only the single dietary consensus statement explicitly attributed to him.

principles.statement: Optimal eating is defined by consuming wholesome foods in sensible combinations.
principles.rationale: This foundational theme captures the essence of diverse healthy diets worldwide, avoiding the trap of arguing over highly specific, prescriptive fad diets.
principles.source_quote: And when I wrote about this with my colleague Frank Hu from Harvard we said wholesome foods in sensible combinations.

heuristics: Eat wholesome foods in sensible combinations.
